title: Groww faces technical glitch, client withdrawals hit
summary: Groww experienced a temporary disruption affecting client fund withdrawals on Friday.  This incident was attributed to an issue with its cloud service provider, Google Cloud Platform.  Some users also reported difficulties depositing money into their accounts.  The brokerage stated the problem was promptly resolved before market closing.  Customers could then access their funds after the disruption ended.

title: IT rally powers markets over 1%; Sensex, Nifty end week with marginal losses
summary: Indian equity indices saw a rise on Friday, boosted by information technology stocks. Tata Consultancy Services' earnings met expectations, easing sector concerns which helped the market. The benchmark indices, however, finished the week marginally lower, ending a winning streak. Renewed West Asia tensions kept investor optimism in check earlier in the week. Brent crude futures traded above $76 a barrel on Friday evening.

title: Kotak Mahindra Bank to pursue acquisitions alongside organic growth
summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank plans to pursue acquisitions and organic growth. The bank recently acquired Deutsche Bank's retail portfolio in India. This move aims to enhance scale and customer reach for the bank. Kotak Mahindra Bank will also tap into India's economic expansion opportunities. A strong balance sheet and leadership talent support future growth strategies.

title: Bank credit growth at two-year high at 18.6% as debt market turns costlier
summary: Bank credit expanded significantly in the fortnight ending June 30. Deposit growth also showed a healthy increase during the same period. This credit demand stems from both consumer and corporate sectors. Corporate entities are increasingly favoring banks over debt markets for funding. The gap between credit and deposit growth widened to 570 basis points.

title: SP Group secures Rs 21,500 crore to refinance debt
summary: Shapoorji Pallonji Group secured significant funding through debt issuance.  This refinancing effort attracted both domestic and global institutional investors.  The company raised approximately Rs 21,500 crore in its initial funding tranche.  Investors showed strong interest, with many participating for the first time.  This move is part of a larger plan to replace higher cost debt.

title: Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 13 July 2026
summary: The Indian stock market saw significant gains on July 10, with Sensex up 1.08% and Nifty 50 rising 1.02%. Investor confidence grew from strong earnings reports and positive international developments, despite a minor weekly dip in indices after four weeks of gains.

title: Three PSU stocks with strong expansion plans
summary: Here is a list of the PSU stocks with strong expansion plans and a growing order book.

title: German luxury carmakers split on hybrids as EV sales surge
summary: BMW dismisses hybrids as costly and unnecessary, while Mercedes is betting on them to ease the shift away from petrol and diesel.

title: Plum picks Rothschild for a record $100 mn fundraise
summary: D2C beauty brand Plum is gearing up for its next phase of growth, tapping Rothschild &amp; Co to raise $75-100 million for offline expansion and new product launches. If successful, the round would set a record for a standalone beauty and personal care brand in India.

title: Lost track of an old PF account? EPFO's new Service History feature can help, here's how
summary: EPFO's new Service History feature lets members view their complete employment and PF records in one place. The update can help subscribers identify missing service records and trace old PF accounts before filing claims.

title: Govt’s hub-and-spoke model for international travel: How will it help airline passengers?
summary: The government’s hub-and-spoke model will allow airline passengers to check in baggage and complete customs and immigration formalities at spoke city airport (Tier-II and -III cities), and take onward flight from the hub city airport (Delhi or other major cities) to international locations.

title: Bank holiday today? Check if SBI, HDFC, ICICI are closed on 11 July for second Saturday off — RBI calendar here
summary: Public and private banks across India will remain closed today, 11 July, for the second Saturday holiday. Bank operations will remain suspended nationwide, but online banking services will remain accessible for transactions.

title: Unique Picks: 7 stocks held by a single MF scheme in June; rally up to 120% in 3 months
summary: ETMarkets identified 40 stocks held exclusively by single mutual fund schemes, with select names delivering up to 117% three-month returns while others declined sharply.

title: Midcap bets! InCred picks 6 stocks with up to 54% upside potential. See full list
summary: InCred Equities has identified six midcap stocks across sectors with upside potential of up to 54%, citing attractive valuations and selective opportunities despite volatile markets, persistent FII selling and inflation concerns.

title: Concurrent Gainers: 10 stocks that gained for 5 days in a row
summary: Despite the Sensex ending lower for the week, 10 BSE 1000 stocks defied market weakness by rising in all five trading sessions, delivering cumulative gains of up to 20% between July 6 and July 10.

title: Will Google be Berkshire CEO Greg Abel's best stock pick after predecessor Warren Buffett's Apple bet?
summary: After taking over the reign as Berkshire Hathaway CEO in January this year, Greg Abel began putting the company’s record cash pile of nearly $400 billion to work. At the centre of this shift in strategy is Google-parent Alphabet.

summary: In a recent report, the brokerage has shortlisted 10 blue-chip stocks across multiple sectors that it believes offer attractive value and the potential to deliver returns of up to 49% return. Here’s the full list.

title: AI chip fever returns? SK Hynix  share price surges 13% after blockbuster $26.5 billion US listing
summary: SK Hynix debuted strongly on Nasdaq, raising $26.5 billion, with shares up 13%. Despite recent semiconductor stock volatility, demand for AI infrastructure drives memory chip prices higher, reflecting strong investor interest in such companies.

title: SBI Funds Management IPO: SBI offloads 1.42% stake to 30 investors ahead of issue | Check latest GMP, IPO details
summary: The SBI Funds Management IPO opens for subscription from July 14 to 16, 2026, with share allotments finalized on July 17. Kotak Mahindra is the lead manager. SBI completed a pre-IPO share transfer to 30 investors, raising  ₹1,655 crore, progressing towards the IPO's launch.

title: Greed and Fear report: Christopher Wood sees 'AI fatigue' setting in. Why Jefferies is turning bullish on India
summary: According to Christopher Wood of Jefferies, AI-linked stock momentum is waning as investors discuss 'AI fatigue.' The firm prefers India's undervalued market over overhyped AI stocks, while remaining positive on the long-term AI investment cycle and memory chip manufacturers as beneficiaries.

title: Chairman's exit a 'challenging event' that raised governance questions: HDFC Bank CEO
summary: In his annual letter to shareholders, Sashidhar Jagdishan noted that an independent probe by Indian and US law firms found no basis for Atanu Chakraborty's allegations regarding internal bank practices.

title: AMFI June Data: Mid-cap, small-cap funds beat flexi-cap inflows for the first time in 30 months. Here's why
summary: Retail investors pumped more money into mid-cap and small-cap funds than flexi-cap funds in June for the first time since Dec 2023. Experts say improving earnings visibility, stronger returns and attractive valuations drove the shift, while cautioning against reading too much into one month's data.

title: Income Tax Department releases ITR-7 Excel utility for AY 2026-27; check who can use it
summary: The Income Tax Department has released the ITR-7 Excel utility for AY 2026-27, enabling eligible entities to prepare returns offline and upload them through the e-filing portal. Here's who can use the form, how the process works and the applicable deadlines.

title: Health insurance checklist: Key policy terms to watch out for before hospital admission
summary: Many policyholders get nasty surprises during hospitalisation. This is mainly due to several limitations buried in the policy terms and conditions, resulting in high out-of-pocket expenses.

title: Wealth management for new parents: Expert explains 5 money moves to secure your child's future
summary: New parents can strengthen their child's financial future through term insurance, health cover, emergency savings and SIP investments. Early investing helps build a  ₹1.2 crore education corpus while protecting the family from unexpected financial risks and rising education costs.

title: Why large cap and mid cap funds could be the best mutual fund to bet on now, according to Abakkus study
summary: Abakkus Mutual Fund's study highlights Large &amp; Mid Cap Funds as an appealing investment option amid improving earnings and reasonable valuations. The market correction has created entry points for long-term investors, suggesting the potential for stock prices to align with earnings growth.

title: Think EPF is completely tax-free? Here's what employees should know
summary: Job switches, career breaks and early withdrawals can all affect the tax treatment of your EPF corpus. Here's a breakdown of the key rules employees should know.

title: Nearly 60% of foreign inflows into India-focused funds withdrawn since 2024 peak: Report
summary: Foreign investors have withdrawn nearly sixty percent of funds from India-focused equity. This capital shift is driven by global artificial intelligence investment opportunities and momentum. Investors pulled nine billion dollars from India funds in calendar year twenty twenty six. Gold funds saw a modest inflow after significant outflows, while US equities attracted fresh investment. Europe also registered its first weekly inflow in nearly three months.

title: Nomura sees 22% upside in Ather Energy. Here's why it's the brokerage's top EV pick
summary: Nomura maintains a 'Buy' rating on Ather Energy, raising its target price to  ₹1,470 due to strong growth potential. The electric two-wheeler market is expected to significantly expand, with Ather seen as a key beneficiary of the shift towards electric mobility.

title: Meta to discontinue controversial AI feature following privacy concerns, Hollywood's SAG-AFTRA union welcomes move
summary: Meta is discontinuing an AI feature launched this week that allowed users to generate images using public Instagram accounts, after drawing widespread criticism over privacy concerns, including from Hollywood's SAG-AFTRA union.&nbsp;

title: What Apple accuses OpenAI of in explosive trade secret lawsuit? A laptop ‘not returned’, secret interviews, & more
summary: Central to Apple's case is the claim that OpenAI's recruitment process doubled as a vehicle for extracting proprietary information.

title: Want Alibaba, Tencent, Baidu in your portfolio? 5 China ETFs Indian investors should know about
summary: Diversifying equity portfolios geographically can be beneficial, especially with China-focused ETFs, which track Chinese companies. While easier for Indian investors through US-listed ETFs, risks such as geopolitical tensions remain.

title: Dearness Allowance: DA hike, OPS, pension revision — Check demands made by Punjab state govt employees, pensioners
summary: Dearness Allowance: From DA hike to restoration of Old Pension Scheme, pension revision, gratuity, minimum wage and more — Check the demands made by Joint Coordination Committee of Punjab Government Employees and Pensioners.

title: Capital gains tax on property sale: ITAT allows home loan interest as cost of acquisition
summary: A Bengaluru ITAT ruling has clarified which expenses can be included in the cost of acquisition while computing capital gains tax on a property sale. The order allows home loan interest and maintenance deposits but requires verification of travel expenses.

title: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund portfolio: 4 new stocks added in June; see the biggest buys and sells
summary: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund made a series of portfolio changes in June, introducing four new stocks, increasing holdings in 18 companies and trimming stakes in 25 others. It also made a complete exit from Ramco Cements during the month.

title: SIF AUM jumps 29% to Rs 17,858 crore in June; inflows surge 171% MoM
summary: Specialised Investment Funds saw assets grow significantly in June 2026.  Total inflows into these funds also experienced a substantial increase. Hybrid Long-Short Funds continued their dominance within the SIF segment.  The broader mutual fund industry also reported healthy investor participation during the month.  SIP contributions reached a record high, indicating sustained retail interest.

title: DMart Q1 results: Higher costs, slower mature-store growth weigh on margins
summary: Quick commerce apps continued to squeeze urban revenue at parent firm Avenue Supermarts, forcing it to lean heavily on tier-II and tier-III market expansions to sustain its momentum.

title: Term Insurance FAQ: How to calculate how much cover you need? When should you stop? Who can skip it entirely?
summary: Term insurance serves as a fundamental part of financial planning, providing affordable life coverage. It's essential to determine how long coverage is needed based on financial responsibilities and existing assets before purchasing a policy.
